Now I see significant changes:
1. The dark gray (G) area expanded from cols 0-51 to cols 0-55 (gained 4 cols width)
2. The white (W) upper area expanded from cols 32-63 to cols 28-63 (gained 4 cols width on the left)

4. The charcoal player moved from cols 46-49 to cols 50-53 (shifted right by 4)
5. The yellow strip next to player moved from cols 50-51 to cols 54-55 (shifted right by 4)
So clicking on the blue target moved the charcoal player 4 cells to the right! The white walkable area also adjusted. This seems like the player moved toward the blue target's column.
The blue target I clicked was at cols 60-63. The player was at cols 46-49 and moved to 50-53. That's a 4-cell shift right. It seems like each click moves the player 4 cells toward the clicked target.
Let me try clicking on the blue target again to move the player further right.
